title: Resetting Your Active Directory / SSO Password
text:
Q: How do I reset my Active Directory / SSO password?
A: To reset your Active Directory or SSO password, first navigate to the company’s password reset portal. You will need to enter your username and follow the prompts to verify your identity, which may include answering security questions or receiving a verification code via email or SMS. Once verified, you will be able to enter a new password. Make sure your new password meets the company’s security requirements, which typically include a mix of uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters. After successfully resetting your password, you may need to log out and log back in to any applications that use your Active Directory credentials. If you encounter any issues during this process, please contact the IT helpdesk for assistance.
